title: Dunja
writer: Emil Burri, Alexander Pushkin, Johannes Mario Simmel
actors: Eva Bartok, Ivan Desny, Karlheinz Böhm
plot: Beautiful Dunja is bored to death at the post office of her father, far in the depths of Russia. When the dubious officer Minski arrives, she's fascinated by his stories about life in St. Petersburg and easily can be persuaded to ...
